channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Nvidia jumps into PCs with new Arm-based chip debuting in laptops from Microsoft, Dell, HP
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang unveiled a long-awaited Arm-based PC chip, breaking into PCs for the first time on new laptops by Dell, Microsoft, HP, ASUS and others.

item.title: Fed's Powell warns Trump's political 'stress test' will wreck public trust in central bank
item.description: Jerome Powell said White House pressure on the Fed will damage public trust in the U.S. central bank.

item.title: Stock futures tick higher to start June as Nvidia rises. But higher oil keeps gain in check: Live updates
item.description: Stocks wrapped up a strong May, with all three major indexes posting solid gains.

item.title: U.S. intercepted Iranian missiles targeting American forces in Kuwait, Central Command says
item.description: The latest attacks further undermine what remains of a U.S.-Iran ceasefire, and will likely add strain to ongoing efforts to reach a deal that will end the war.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Nvidia, Arm, Taylor Morrison, Qualcomm & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

item.title: Here Monday's the biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Broadcom, Microsoft, IBM, Meta, Tyson Foods & more
item.description: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Monday.

item.title: The stock market just did something eerily similar to the dotcom bubble top in 2000
item.description: Surging stock performance in May was concentrated in the AI adjacent.

item.title: Berkshire buys Taylor Morrison for $6.8 billion. Buffett touts Abel’s dealmaking
item.description: The acquisition marks one of the first major strategic deals under Warren Buffett's successor Greg Abel, who took over as CEO in the beginning of 2026.

item.title: AI revolution is ‘50x bigger’ than the dot-com boom: SoftBank's Masayoshi Son to CNBC
item.description: The AI revolution will be 50 times bigger than the dot-com revolution in the 2000s, SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son told CNBC Monday.

item.title: Arm, IBM and Hewlett Packard soar as Nvidia chip 'reinvention' extends software rally
item.description: Shares in software compares surged ahead of Monday's opening bell.

item.title: 'Disrupted or dead': AI is crushing a generation of startups built before ChatGPT
item.description: The AI boom that has funneled more than $250 billion into OpenAI and Anthropic has left hundreds of startups built before ChatGPT's arrival in 2022 stranded.

item.title: Retail had a 'surprisingly robust' first quarter, but the real test is ahead as tax refunds dry up
item.description: The retail industry saw strong first-quarter sales and profits, but high tax refunds and buy now, pay later helped mask underlying consumer weakness.

item.title: Softbank's Masayoshi Son reveals where he sees the next trillion-dollar opportunity
item.description: CNBC asked Softbank's CEO where he sees opportunities emerging. The Japanese multinational has invested across the technology stack.

item.title: Why Trump reversed course to fast-track psychedelic drugs for mental healthcare
item.description: President Donald Trump is trying to fast-track research into psychedelics as treatments, creating new opportunities and risks.

item.title: Berkshire trails red-hot S&P 500 by biggest margin so far this year
item.description: Berkshire's widely held B shares are now running 16.3 percentage points behind the benchmark index year-to-date, the biggest gap so far in 2026.

item.title: This drone stock has surged over the past year. Roth Capital says it can rally another 70%
item.description: Red Cat Holdings is likely to see more upside as the U.S. commits to investing more in drones and related defense technologies, per Roth Capital Partners.

item.title: Treasury yields hold steady after U.S. and Iran exchange strikes
item.description: Treasury yields rose Monday after the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire near the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: The daughter of Thailand's beer billionaire says she never doubted women belonged at the top
item.description: Thapanee Techajareonvikul reflects on family, succession and leadership inside the billionaire empire behind Chang beer, Big C and Singapore beverage giant Fraser & Neave.

item.title: Nvidia, Meta and Schlumberger rank among top companies adopting AI, new study says
item.description: The AI-Driven Enterprise Institute released new research that breaks down how well S&P 500 companies are adopting AI compared to their peers.

item.title: Trump hits out at ‘chirping’ critics as U.S. and Iran launch fresh wave of strikes
item.description: Trump's Truth Social post comes as air strikes between the U.S. and Iran resumed over the weekend.

item.title: My guide to the IPOs of SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic — including the one I really want to buy
item.description: These three expected deals will define 2026 and maybe even 2027. Here's my advice on how to play them.

item.title: Owning a car is a huge expense right now — these 3 tools can help you save
item.description: Car warranties, comparison shopping tools and refinancing can make owning a car more affordable. Here's how to take action.

item.title: Oil prices climb over 3% as U.S.-Iran talks at impasse, Israel expands Lebanon offensive
item.description: Oil prices rose on Monday after Israel instructed troops to push deeper into Lebanon amid renewed clashes with the Iran-backed Hezbollah group.

item.title: SoftBank becomes Japan's most valuable company, announces $53 billion French investment
item.description: The Japanese tech giant plans to develop and operate 5 GW of AI data center capacity in France, with an initial 3.1 GW of facilities in the country's north.

item.title: Nvidia-backed $5 billion AI company tells CNBC of major London expansion
item.description: Runway follows U.S. AI giants including Anthropic and OpenAI in announcing big London growth plans.

item.title: Student loan borrowing is 'high stakes' as new rules take effect on July 1, CFP says. What to know
item.description: Experts say that student loan borrowers should proceed with caution when taking on more debt or consolidating after July 1, due to upcoming changes.

item.title: European defense stocks are cooling off after the military spending boom. Here's what's next
item.description: Analysts see 2026 as a period of consolidation for the sector, as excitement over Europe's increased defense budget is replaced by company-specific drivers.

item.title: Former Barclays CEO Jes Staley agrees to July 23 interview about Jeffrey Epstein by Oversight panel
item.description: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates is scheduled to be interviewed about his relationship to the sex offender Jeffrey Epstein in June.

item.title: Stocks including Nvidia and Apple are top picks as market run-up continues, Bank of America says
item.description: Bank of America named some of its favorite stocks to buy in June.

item.title: Top Wall Street analysts see robust growth potential in these 3 stocks
item.description: Investors keen on capitalizing on the AI boom can track recommendations from top Wall Street analysts
